interhour-ninth-theotokion.label: Theotokion of the Interhour of the Ninth Hour
interhour-ninth-theotokion.text: O most glorious Mother of Christ our God, cease not to intercede for us who hymn thee, that He may deliver us from every sorrow and grant us good things; for thou art the sole helper of Christians.
